name: @progress-checker/infrastructure-cdk
description: AWS CDK infrastructure for KCL Progress Board.

scripts.lint: npm run format:check --silent && biome lint . && npm run typecheck --silent
scripts.synth: npm run synth:stg --silent && npm run synth:prod --silent
scripts.synth:stg: npm run build --silent && cdk synth -c stage=stg
scripts.synth:prod: npm run build --silent && cdk synth -c stage=prod
scripts.cdk:lint: npm run lint --silent && npm run synth --silent --
scripts.cdk:plan:stg: npm run build --silent && cdk diff --all -c stage=stg
scripts.cdk:plan:prod: npm run build --silent && cdk diff --all -c stage=prod
scripts.cdk:apply:stg: npm run build --silent && cdk deploy --all -c stage=stg
scripts.cdk:apply:prod: npm run build --silent && cdk deploy --all -c stage=prod
